comment: M4 Sarptepe observatory control room: 4-tile sheet (floor_lino, floor_lino_var, wall_panel, window_sky; 16x16 art baked 2x -> 32x32) + 9-prop console/rack/archive sheet + the Day-1 printout overlay (obs_printout.png, 128x96 art -> 256x192, the ONLY signal-magenta canvas). Fluorescent-dim dusk; stone/ship/paper/amber/rose/crt/void ramps; signal only on the printout trace.
